{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032203593949810B83401B2612E389"}"},"total":374},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7547994099266962201","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的挺好的，既适当的参与到了洪荒大事件，又没有过度的牵涉进去，作者加油，多更"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1757413977,"group_id":"7535770847332551742","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8r/adTWL8grLqmmTKzlB2CblfzVcNlOeU8ErSaB/SGk","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b1a74ff1360a44a8952697826fe0f13a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705384&x-signature=KtHdhBzvFLYDcAnX4c7Pn9%2BUDbo%3D","user_id":"3505700617586014","user_name":"小熊猫(●—●)"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3505700617586014","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1705477299,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7535770847332551742","book_info":{"abstract":"无系统➕洪荒➕封神➕西游➕部分私设
穿越洪荒，开局三清成圣。李衍深知，这波澜壮阔的世界背后，是无穷无尽的量劫杀机。
那么我，李衍，有且只有一种结局，稳健！苟过所有量劫！！！
他拜入最护短的元始天尊门下，成了阐教那个不显山露水的小师弟。
所有人都以为这个小师弟性情谨慎，不擅争斗。当九曲黄河阵中，阐教众仙三花尽灭，当通天教主摆下诛仙剑阵，当西方二圣意图渡尽有缘…
这位阐教最为“稳健”的小师弟，执扇而出，身后周天星辰闪耀，五行轮转。
这一刻，众人才惊觉，这位看似最与世无争的小弟子，早已不一样了。
步步为营，积攒实力，自在逍遥！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9a9f4d22f36af4f25af551aff3700a18","author":"不一样了的萧梓丞","author_id":"","book_id":"7535770847332551742","book_name":"洪荒：封神把三宵关进麒麟崖","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7535770895160181310","read_count":"34927","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"981594"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.3","serial_count":"439","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,仙侠,穿越,洪荒,奇幻仙侠","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a650e92fab5c27c4254e6b6c7ab9f248~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779307179&x-signature=tG65tDQZIEDrRwi7WBUHEZQLcuo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"110630074689","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"56"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032203593949810B83401B2612E389"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_durat
